name: testILSetMessageProperty
title: testILSetMessageProperty
syntax: long testILSetMessageProperty( dbNode node, dbMessage msg, char propertyName[], long propertyValue);
description: Sets the internal property of a message, assigned to the node.
Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Node name as defined in the database.
